value.found_quote: If you stop a run, you can resume it: agents that already completed return their cached results, and the rest run live. Resume a paused run from `/workflows` by selecting it and pressing `p`... Resume works within the same Claude Code session.
value.rationale: The page's "Resume after a pause" section describes resuming a stopped run within the same session, where already-completed agents return their cached results while the rest run live — directly matching the claim.
